title: Reuse a read-only or mutable zero Angle
prompt:
In Garry's Mod Lua, you need a zero Angle often in a hot path. Show the faster approach compared to constructing a new Angle() every time. Treat shared constants as read-only; if the caller must mutate the Angle, reuse an owned Angle and reset it.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: read-only angle_zero or owned Angle:Zero() reuse
